tṛṣ f. [tṛṣ-saṃpa˚ kvip]
1 (nom. sing. tṛṭ-ḍ)
1 Thirst; tṛṣā śuṣyatyāsye pibati salilaṃ svādu surabhi  Bh. 3. 92 ;  Rs. 1. 11. 
2 Strong desire, eagerness.
3 Desire personified as the daughter of Kāma.
